author: IGN YouTube
text:
SAND: Raiders of Sophie - Official Early Access Launch Trailer
Check out the Early Access Launch Trailer for SAND: Raiders of Sophie, a vehicular extraction combat shooter developed by Hologryph and TowerHaus. Players will traverse a dieselpunk desert world to assemble fortresses, engage in action-packed combat with an array of weapons on wheels, and survive to reach the extraction point at all costs. SAND: Raiders of Sophie is available now in Early Access for PC (Steam).

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Forza Horizon 6 - Official Volkswagen Rallye Golf Trailer
Take a look at the Volkswagen Rallye Golf Trailer for Forza Horizon 6, the latest entry in the arcade racing game developed by Playground Games. Players can get behind the wheel of a 1989 Volkswagen Rallye Golf as a new off-road vehicle added to the Festival. The Volkswagen Rallye Golf is available now in Forza Horizon 6 for Xbox Series X|S and PC.

text:
Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Official Skitarii Class Prologue Trailer
Don't miss the Skitarii Class Prologue Trailer for Warhammer 40,000: Darktide, a first-person action shooter developed by Fatshark. Players will get a new look at the upcoming Skitarii Class, a new class that is devoted to a Machine God equipped with sacred instruments of precision and destruction. Fight as the Skitarii Class in Warhammer 40,000: Darktide on June 23 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Game Pass, and PC (Steam).

#IGN #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Cyberpunk 2077 Gameplay on Steam Machine
Valve's $1300 Steam Machine sits in a pretty hefty price range, and for all that money it better be able to play top of the line games, right? In this video, we're putting Cyberpunk 2077 to the test in order to see how it performs across the open world while driving and in close-quarter combat scenarios. Here's 9 minutes of Cyberpunk 2077 running on the Steam Machine.

#Cyberpunk2077 #Gaming #SteamMachine

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Klara and the Sun - Official Trailer (2026) Jenna Ortega, Amy Adams, Steve Buscemi
Check out the Official Trailer for Klara and the Sun, a comedic sci-fi drama film distributed by Sony Pictures. Explore the idea of artificial friends based on the book by Kazuo Ishiguro in Klara and the Sun, in theaters on October 23.

Klara and the Sun introduces audiences to Klara (Jenna Ortega), an Artificial Friend who wants nothing more than to find the perfect home. When Klara meets Josie (Mia Tharia), each immediately senses a kindred spirit in the other. Josie has a fraught relationship with her mother (Amy Adams), and they’ve suffered great loss, but Klara’s innocent wonder and unwavering loyalty begin to heal the family and bring light to Josie’s complicated world.

Klara and the Sun stars Jenna Ortega, Amy Adams, Mia Tharia, Aran Murphy, Steve Buscemi, Natasha Lyonne, and more. The film is directed by Taika Waititi and executive produced by Gary Barber, Alex G. Scott, Jeffrey Clifford, Rosie Alison, and Kazuo Ishiguro.

Klara and the Sun is in theaters on October 23.

#KlaraAndTheSun #Movies #IGN

text:
Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth Gameplay on Steam Machine
The Steam Machine has arrived on your desks. today, we're putting Final Fantasy VII Rebirth through its paces on Valve's Steam Machine PC/Console hybrid. We get into some combat, pet a few Chocobo's, as well as fight a boss to see how well the game hold's up. Here's 19 minutes of Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth running on the Steam Machine.

text:
SAW: Genesis - Official Game Features Overview Trailer
Don't miss the Game Features Overview Trailer for SAW: Genesis, an upcoming asymmetrical horror game developed by Broken Mirror Games and Anshar Studios. Players will work together as the Accused to solve puzzles, survive traps, and face the Judge, an early architect of Jigsaw’s philosophy. Get the rundown on key gameplay elements for SAW: Genesis, coming soon to PC (Steam), with sign-ups for the Closed Alpha available now.

#SAWGenesis #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Valve on the Steam Machine's Price, Performance and Whether or Not You'll Actually Be Able to Buy it
Ever since the Steam Machine was revealed in November 2025, Valve was telling us that it was just another option for folks hoping to get into PC gaming. Recently, we got a chance to sit down with Valve Engineers Pierre-Loup Griffais and Yazan Aldehayyat to discuss the Steam Machine, and how it was made. And, well, it sounds like Valve was able to achieve everything it wanted to with the Machine, except for the price. Even there, though, it sounds like Valve was able to at least mitigate the impact the RAM crisis had on the Steam Machine.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
007 First Light Gameplay On Steam Machine
With the Steam Machine in-hand, we decided to put IOI's newest stealth actions game, 007 First Light, to the test to see how well Valve's new PC/Console hybrid handles the game. In this gameplay sessions, we have 007 First Light running at 4K resolution with AMD FSR Upscaling. Here's 007 First Light Gameplay On Steam Machine.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Steam Machine Unboxing
The Steam Machine is finally here! Valve sent us its new gaming PC/console hybrid to test out before it goes on sale. We take it out of its simple but sleek packaging and show off what comes in the box.

The Steam Machine will come in two variants: the 512GB model costs $1,049, while the 2TB model, which comes with two extra interchangeable faceplates, costs $1,349. Both models can be bundled with the Steam Controller for an additional $79.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Steam Machine Review: Valve's New Console/PC Hybrid
The Steam Machine is Valve's new piece of hardware entering the scene as a mini PC built for living room gaming. We love a lot about it, had some issues with it, but overall came away from our time with it feeling very positive. 

The big question mark has been around the Steam Machine price. After the Steam Deck had a jump in price, we knew that would be a major factor in who to recommend this to for PC gaming. The Steam Machine specs in coordination with how well it works with the Steam Controller being still make this an appealing PC rig to consider. 

For all things Valve and Steam related, keep it locked to IGN
